meaning: n.幸福,幸运,福气,(措辞等)恰当,巧妙,幸福,幸运
examples: He got it out, rumpled and wilted, and it mightily increased his dismal felicity.
Felicity seemed pleased at the suggestion.
Felicity Maxwell stood by the bar and ordered a glass of wine.
Sophie Christiansen, Ricky Balshaw, Simon Laurens and Felicity Coulthard make up the remainder of the team.
He also created or co-created such acclaimed television series as Felicity, Alias, Lost and Fringe.
